violations.text: An allergy statement is lacking on the menus. Allergy statement to be added. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2025

Establishment is using time to hold egg rolls. PIC placed egg rolls in unit to cool down. Product must be held above 135 or below 41 degrees. Establishment shall not use time for product unless approved to do so. Application provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2025
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of bio-film. Ice machine to be emptied and cleaned by end of day. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2025

The pre-flush spray hose at the 3-bay sink is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2025
The receptacle in the unisex toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the front area. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2024
The hand-washing sink in the front area was lacking paper towels. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2024

Thermometers are lacking in the refrigeration units. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of bio-film. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2024

The pre-flush spray hose at the 3-bay is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2024
The ceiling in the back prep area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2024

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2024

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the front service area. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023
The hand-washing sinks in the front service area and the restroom were lacking paper towels. Paper towels to be supplied at all times for proper hand drying. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023
Food items were observed stored on the floor in the back storage area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023

Bags of food ingredients were observed stored in the back storage room uncovered. Bags are to be stored closed or in covered bins protecting the food(s) from possible contamination. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023

Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Utensils are to be stored on a clean/protected location or surface between uses and properly washed/rinsed/sanitized at a frequency of at least every 4 hours. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the the cookline equipment were observed to have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-FOOD-CONTACT SURFACES of EQUIPMENT shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to preclude accumulation of soil residues. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2023

The ceiling in the back prep area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Ceiling tiles are to be of a constructed material that is smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2024

The following areas of the physical facilities were observed to have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris... - The floor in the cookline and warewashing areas under/behind equipment - The light shield over the prep/warewashing area The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2023
